warnings: ABAP session variables like $session.client, $session.system_language, $session.user_timezone may not have direct Snowflake equivalents
ABAP-specific functions like unit_conversion, dats_days_between, dats_to_datn, dats_add_days, utcl_current, utcl_add_seconds may not translate directly
ABAP typed literals (abap.int4, abap.char, etc.) converted to standard SQL literals
Some ABAP CDS functions may not have exact Snowflake equivalents
assumptions: Parameters are passed as bind variables using :parameter_name syntax
ABAP session variables mapped to closest Snowflake equivalents where possible
ABAP-specific date/time functions replaced with standard SQL DATEDIFF/DATEADD
Unit conversion function replaced with simple multiplication factor
Projection references resolved to actual column names in same SELECT
ABAP 'IS NOT INITIAL' translated to 'IS NOT NULL'
conversion_notes: Converted ABAP CDS DEFINE VIEW to SQL CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
Translated ABAP typed literals to standard SQL literals
Converted ABAP case expressions to SQL CASE WHEN...THEN...ELSE...END
Replaced ABAP-specific functions with closest SQL equivalents
Parameters converted from $parameters.name to :name bind variable syntax
Session variables converted to Snowflake system functions where available
